landing.badge: Mufhaṱi wa phothifoḽio wa u fhedzisela wa vhabveledzi
landing.subtitle: Zwothe zwine na zwi toda u sumbedza vhukoni hanu, dzi project, na tshenzhemo.
landing.liveStatus: dzina ḽa mushumisi.dev ḽi khou tshila!
landing.featuresSubtitle: Ri vha nea zwishumiswa zwothe zwine vha zwi toda uri vha kone u fhambana na vhanwe na u wana mushumo wavho wa muloro.
landing.feature1Title: Mufhaṱi wa u kokodza na u posa
landing.feature1Desc: Kha vha dzudzanye nga hu leluwaho zwipiḓa zwavho, phurojeke, na zwikili nga mudzudzanyi washu wa zwifanyiso zwi pfalaho.
landing.feature2Desc: Khethani kha thempleithi dzo ḓiitelaho nga nḓila ya vhutsila kana ni ite mbonalo yaṋu yo khetheaho.
landing.feature3Desc: Tevhelani vhaeni vhaṋu, vhonani uri ndi phurojeke dzifhio dzine dza dzhielwa nṱha vhukuma, na zwiṅwe.

neoBrutalism.desc: Mikano yo khwaṱhaho na mivhala ya nṱha ya u fhambana u itela u vhonala ha mvelele, hu sa ṱoḓi pfarelo.

setup2fa.step1Desc: Kha vha vule app yavho ya u khwaṱhisedza vha skene khoudu ya QR i tevhelaho:

about.title: Nga ha Khumbelo
about.subtitle: Puḽatifomo ya Mufhaṱi wa Phothifoḽio
about.description: DevFolio ndi pulatifomo ya mufhaṱi wa phothifoḽio ya musalauno yo itelwaho vhabveledzi, vhadizaini, na vhasiki vha phurofeshinala.
about.copyright: © 2026 DevFolio Inc. Pfanelo dzoṱhe dzo vhulungea.

deleteAccount.title: U phumula akhaunthu lwa tshoṱhe
deleteAccount.successMessage: Imeili ya u khwaṱhisedza u phumulwa ha akhaunthu yo rumelwa.
deleteAccount.errorMessage: Vho kundelwa u rumela imeiḽi ya u khwaṱhisedza.
deleteAccount.confirmationMessage: Ni na vhuṱanzi ha uri ni khou ṱoḓa u phumula akhaunthu yaṋu lwa tshoṱhe?
deleteAccount.warningMessage1: U ḓo wana email ya u khwaṱhisedza u phumulwa ha akhaunthu.
deleteAccount.warningMessage2: Arali zwa khwaṱhisedzwa, datha yoṱhe (phothifoḽio, phurojeke, zwitatamennde) i ḓo phumulwa lwa tshoṱhe nahone a i nga ḓo vhuyedzedzwa.

toasts.toastSetup2FAFailed: U kundelwa u setha 2FA. Ndi khou humbela uri ni lingedze hafhu.
toasts.toast2FAEnabled: U khwaṱhisedzwa ha zwithu zwivhili zwo tendelwa.
toasts.toast2FADisabled: U khwaṱhisedzwa ha zwithu zwivhili zwo thivhelwa.
toasts.toastSessionEnabled: U monithara ha sesheni hu shumaho ho tendelwa.
toasts.toastSessionDisabled: U monithara ha sesheni hu shumaho ho thivhelwa.
toasts.toastSetupKeyCopied: Setup key yo kopiwa kha bodo ya u ṅwala.

privacy.title: Mbekanyamaitele ya zwa vhuṋe
privacy.updateDate: U fhedzisela u khwiniswa: Ḽa 15 Fulwi, 2026
privacy.intro: Mbekanyamaitele iyi ya Vhuṋe i ṱalutshedza nḓila ine DevFolio ya kuvhanganya, u shumisa, na u tsireledza ngayo mafhungo aṋu a vhuṋe musi ni tshi shumisa tshumelo dzashu.
privacy.section1Content: Ri kuvhanganya mafhungo ane na a ṋea thwii musi ni tshi sika akhaunthu, u fhaṱa phothifoḽio, na u kwamana na thikhedzo yashu.
privacy.section2Content: Mafhungo aṋu a shumiswa u itela u shumisa, u ṱhogomela, na u ṋea zwishumiswa zwa tshumelo dzashu, khathihi na u davhidzana na inwi malugana na akhaunthu yaṋu kana tshumelo dzaṋu.
privacy.section3Content: Ri shumisa maga a tsireledzo a pfalaho u itela u tsireledza mafhungo aṋu kha u swikelela hu songo tendelwaho, u bvisela khagala, kana u fheliswa.

confirmDeleteAccount.missingToken: Token ya u khwaṱhisedza a yo ngo wanala.
confirmDeleteAccount.defaultError: Zwo kundelwa u phumula akhaunthu. Token i nga vha yo fhelelwa nga tshifhinga.
confirmDeleteAccount.loadingMessage: Kha vha lindele, ri khou shuma khumbelo yavho.
confirmDeleteAccount.successTitle: Account yo phumulwa nga nḓila yo bvelelaho
confirmDeleteAccount.successMessage: Data yavho yothe yo phumulwa lwa tshothe. U do livhiswa...

forgotPassword.otpSentToEmail: Khoudu ya OTP yo rumelwa kha email yavho.
forgotPassword.emailThirdParty: Email iyi yo nwaliswa nga muthu wa vhuraru.
forgotPassword.genericError: Hu na vhukhakhi. Ndi khou humbela uri ni lingedze hafhu.
forgotPassword.otpVerified: Khoudu ya OTP yo khwaṱhisedzwa nga nḓila yo bvelelaho.
forgotPassword.otpExpired: Khoudu ya OTP yo fhela tshifhinga. Kha vha humbele khoudu ntswa.
forgotPassword.otpInvalid: Khoudu ya OTP a i shumi.
forgotPassword.otpResent: Khoudu ntswa ya OTP yo rumelwa kha email yavho.
forgotPassword.otpResendFailed: U kundelwa u rumela hafhu khoudu ya OTP. Ndi khou humbela uri ni lingedze hafhu.
forgotPassword.passwordResetSuccess: Password yo bvelela kha u vusuludzwa. Kha vha dzhene nga password yavho ntswa.
forgotPassword.title: Ndo hangwa phasiwedi
forgotPassword.description: Ṅwalani ḓiresi ya imeiḽi yo ṅwaliswaho kha akhaunthu yaṋu. Ri do rumela khoudu ya OTP u itela u vusuludza password.
forgotPassword.verifyOtpDesc: Kha vha ṅwale khoudu ya 6 digit ye ​​ya rumelwa kha email yavho u itela u khwaṱhisedza vhuṋe havho.
forgotPassword.resendOtp: U rumela hafhu Khoudu ya OTP
forgotPassword.newPasswordDesc: Kha vha ite password ntswa, yo khwaṱhaho u itela u tsireledza akhaunthu yavho.

verifyEmail.resendError: Zwo kundelwa u rumela hafhu imeiḽi ya u khwaṱhisedza. Ndi khou humbela uri ni lingedze hafhu.
verifyEmail.checkingStatus: U sedza tshiimo tsha u khwaṱhisedza...
verifyEmail.title: Kha vha sedze Email Yavho
verifyEmail.description: Ro rumela email ya u khwathisedza kha email address yavho. Kha vha vule imeiḽi vha puṱedze gunubu ya <1>"Ṱhogomelani akhaunthu"</1> u itela uri akhaunthu yavho i shume.
verifyEmail.step1: Vula tshumiso ya imeiḽi yaṋu (Gmail, Yahoo, na zwiṅwe-vho)
verifyEmail.step2: Kha vha sedze email i bvaho kha DevFolio ine ya vha na thero "U Thoma ha Akhaunthu"
verifyEmail.step3: Kha vha dzhene kha "Kha vha khwaṱhisedze akhaunthu" kha email
verifyEmail.step4: U do livhiswa kha siatari la u dzhena uri a dzhene
verifyEmail.resendSuccess: Imeili ya u khwaṱhisedza yo rumelwa hafhu!
verifyEmail.resendButton: Rumelani hafhu Email ya u khwaṱhisedza
verifyEmail.backToLogin: Vhuyelela kha Siaṱari ḽa u Dzhena
verifyEmail.footerNote: A vha athu wana email? Sedzani foldara ya <1>Spam</1> kana <2>Zunk</2> kha imeiḽi yaṋu. Link ya u khwaṱhisedza i shuma lwa <3>awara dza 24</3>.
